message:
fix(dashboard): prefetch panes before TUI init, remove eager session check, seed initial state

Dashboard startup (cli/dashboard.go):
- Replaced the eager tmux.SessionExists() check with a prefetch call
  to tmux.GetPanesWithActivityContext() using a 500ms timeout. This
  serves dual purpose: validating the session exists (by checking the
  error message for "can't find session") AND collecting initial pane
  data that can be seeded into the model, eliminating the blank-screen
  flash on first render.
- The prefetch result ([]tmux.PaneActivity) is passed to RunWithOptions
  via the new InitialPanes field.

Dashboard model (dashboard.go, model.go, run.go):
- Added seedInitialPanes() method that populates m.panes from the
  prefetched PaneActivity slice, marks initialPaneSnapshotDone=true,
  updates stats, and rebuilds the pane list — all before the first
  frame renders, so the user sees agent status immediately.
- Added InitialPanes field to RunOptions so the CLI layer can pass
  prefetched data to the TUI model.
- Removed mouseWarmupPending field from model (mouse enable now
  handled via the renderer init path instead of a separate flag).
- Adjusted warmup sequence: moved startRendererInit and startConfigWatcher
  calls into the post-startup warmup phase where they belong, removing
  duplicate calls from the first-frame path.

Benchmark (bench_test.go):
- Added BenchmarkDashboardNew measuring allocation cost of New() +
  cleanup(), useful for tracking startup regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -181,7 +181,6 @@ type Model struct {
 	spawnActive         bool // Whether a spawn is currently active (for adaptive polling)
 	fetchingPTHealth    bool // Whether we're currently fetching process_triage health states
 	startupWarmupDone   bool // Ensures post-startup background warmup only runs once
-	mouseWarmupPending  bool // Enable mouse support after the first painted frame
 
 	// Coalescing/cancellation for user-triggered refreshes
 	sessionFetchPending bool
